subtitle: Farmer ↔ Consumer Marketplace
heroDesc: Buy vegetables, wheat, rice, and fresh crops directly from nearby farmers with secure payments and smart delivery tracking.
featuresDesc: Everything needed for a modern agriculture marketplace.
feat1Desc: Consumers can buy crops directly from nearby farmers.
feat2Desc: Payments are safely held until crop pickup verification.
feat3Desc: Farmers can track live market crop prices.
feat4Desc: Supports both English and Hindi languages.
trackHistoricalPrices: Track historical crop prices over the last year to make informed decisions.
contactSubtitle: Have questions about buying or selling crops? Our support team is here to help you get the most out of Farm2Home.
featuresPageTitle: Empowering the Roots, Feeding the Future
featuresPageSubtitle: A dual-sided ecosystem designed to bring transparency, better margins for farmers, and fresher produce for consumers.
smartOnboardingDesc: Verified profiles for Farmers (Aadhaar-linked OTP) and Consumers. Secure MongoDB storage ensures your data stays private and safe.
farmerListingsDesc: Directly upload crops with images, harvest dates, and pricing. Access 'Ugly Sell' for discounted surplus and 'Pre-list' for future harvests.
proximityBuyingDesc: Find fresh produce nearby using PIN code validation. Trello-style cards show you exactly how far your food traveled.
secureFulfillmentDesc: Escrow-style payments. Funds are released to farmers within 24 hours of a successful OTP-verified delivery partner pickup.
realTimeAnalyticsDesc: Farmers get live market price trends via external APIs and a dedicated dashboard to track orders, ratings, and reviews.
directCommDesc: Integrated chat system allows farmers and consumers to coordinate logistics post-order, supported in English and Hindi.
trustGuarantee1: 24-hour cancellation policy for total consumer peace of mind.
trustGuarantee2: Automated penalty system for delivery delays to ensure farmer accountability.
trustGuarantee3: Verified bank transfers directly to registered farmer accounts.
messageSuccess: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you soon.
testimonialTitle: Trusted by thousands of Farmers & Consumers
testimonialSubtitle: Real stories from the people who are revolutionizing the Indian agriculture marketplace.
test1Text: Farm2Home has increased my profit margins by 35% by eliminating middlemen.
test2Text: The quality of vegetables I get here is far superior to anything in the local market.
fd_noListings: No listings yet. Start selling today!
cd_noProductsDesc: Try adjusting your filters, searching for something else, or clearing all filters.
cd_orderHistoryDesc: Track and manage your recent purchases
cd_noOrdersDesc: Start shopping to see your fresh produce history here!
